reasoning:
NL Ambiguous

RegularSpace: For any closed set s and point a ∉ s, a and s have disjoint           
  neighborhoods. (Bare separation axiom, no T₁.)
                                                                                      
  CompletelyRegularSpace: For any closed set K and point x ∉ K, there exists a        
  continuous f : X → [0,1] with f x = 0 and f = 1 on K. (Bare separation axiom, no
  T₁.)
